---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for Tardus
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Component / Area
- [ ] `tardus-core` (cryptographic primitives)
- [ ] `tardus-mint` (mint protocol / DKG)
- [ ] `tardus-client` (client library)
- [ ] `tardus-wallet` / `tardus-wallet-gui`
- [ ] `tardus-program` (Solana on-chain program)
- [ ] `tardus-relay`
- [ ] `tardus-validator`
- [ ] `tardus-refresh`
- [ ] `tardus-cli`
- [ ] `ts-sdk`
- [ ] `web`
- [ ] Protocol / Spec change
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] Other: ___

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them? -->

## Protocol / Security Impact
<!-- Does this change affect the cryptographic protocol, security assumptions, or on-chain program?
     If yes, a spec update and formal review will be required before implementation. -->
- [ ] No protocol change
- [ ] Minor protocol change (backward compatible)
- [ ] Breaking protocol change (requires migration plan)
- [ ] Requires cryptographic review
- [ ] Requires Solana program audit

## Additional Context
<!-- Links to related issues, papers, or prior art -->
